# PartGenie

> PartGenie is an AI assistant for electronic component sourcing: datasheet Q&A, BOM analysis, part and alternative finders, and parametric category discovery. Public SEO pages live on partgenie.ai; the product app is at app.partgenie.ai.

PartGenie publishes structured component intelligence for semiconductors and passives in English and German. Use partgenie.ai for canonical MPN pages, alternatives, manufacturer hubs, and category selection guides.

## Product

- [PartGenie App](https://app.partgenie.ai/app/chat): Main AI chat for component questions and BOM workflows.
- [Datasheet AI](https://www.partgenie.ai/datasheet-ai): Marketing entry for datasheet Q&A and spec extraction.
- [AI Component Finder](https://www.partgenie.ai/ai-component-finder): Find parts by requirements and constraints.
- [Alternative Finder](https://www.partgenie.ai/alternative-finder): Cross-reference and substitute part discovery.
- [AI BOM Analyzer](https://www.partgenie.ai/ai-bom-analyzer): BOM risk, lifecycle, and replacement review.

## pSEO — Parts & alternatives

- [Part pages](https://partgenie.ai/parts/): Canonical URLs for individual MPNs (specs, alternatives, datasheets).
- [Alternative pages](https://partgenie.ai/alternatives/): Cross-reference and substitute parts for a given MPN.
- [STM32F103C8T6 intelligence](https://partgenie.ai/parts/stm32f103c8t6): Example published part page with specs and alternatives.
- [STM32F103C8T6 alternatives](https://partgenie.ai/alternatives/stm32f103c8t6): Example alternative cross-reference page.

## pSEO — Hubs

- [Category directory](https://partgenie.ai/categories/): Parametric category hubs (MCU, connectors, sensors, and more).
- [MCU category hub](https://partgenie.ai/categories/mcu): Microcontroller selection intelligence and popular parts.
- [Manufacturer directory](https://partgenie.ai/manufacturers/): Browse manufacturers by category and letter.
- [STMicroelectronics hub](https://partgenie.ai/manufacturers/stmicroelectronics): Example manufacturer intelligence hub.

## Marketing site

- [PartGenie (www)](https://www.partgenie.ai/): Company homepage, pricing, and product overview.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/partgenie/): Official PartGenie company page.

## Optional

- [German pSEO](https://partgenie.ai/de/parts/): Locale-prefixed mirrors under `/de/`.
- [Sitemap index](https://partgenie.ai/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable URL list for search engines (www + pSEO).
